description: Pet and summon type definitions — controls summoned creature grouping, UI display, automap visibility, and icon assignment. Referenced by the pettype column in Skills.txt.

pet type.description: Pet type name identifier, referenced by Skills.txt pettype column

idx.description: Numeric index for internal pet type lookup

group.description: Pet group ID (pets in the same group are mutually exclusive)

basemax.description: Base maximum number of this pet type (for oskill/set bonus pet persistence)

warp.description: Pet warps/teleports to follow the player

unsummon.description: Pet can be unsummoned by the player

drawhp.description: Draw pet health bar in the UI

icontype.description: Pet icon display type in the UI panel

baseicon.description: Base icon cell index for this pet type

mclass1.description: Monster class 1 that uses this pet icon

micon1.description: Icon cell index for monster class 1

mclass2.description: Monster class 2 that uses this pet icon

micon2.description: Icon cell index for monster class 2

mclass3.description: Monster class 3 that uses this pet icon

micon3.description: Icon cell index for monster class 3

mclass4.description: Monster class 4 that uses this pet icon

micon4.description: Icon cell index for monster class 4

eol.description: End of line marker (not loaded by game)
